fixture.notes: Snapshot pinned to the report date so the adjudication stays valid. Since-shipped items would otherwise reclassify (per DOCSP-61274 validation note).

label_definitions.Confirmed: Real, actionable drift. Eligible to become a held draft DOCSP ticket.
label_definitions.Tracked: Real drift already covered by an open DOCSP ticket. Report names the ticket; no new ticket.
label_definitions.Upcoming: Accurate vs source but tied to an unreleased version. In report, separated, never a ticket.
label_definitions.Intentional: Hidden/internal/legacy/illustrative-by-design surface. In report, separated, never a ticket.
label_definitions.Needs-eng-confirmation: Cannot be settled from source alone; flag for engineering. Never auto-becomes a ticket.
label_definitions.Not-drift: Tool false positive. Must NOT surface as Confirmed. Tracks the prototype's known tool errors.

coverage_gaps: No Upcoming finding in this fixture; cover Upcoming on a later pilot (the report excluded mongosync 1.20 items before they became findings).
No Tracked finding; #9 references DOCSP-55016 only partially and is adjudicated Not-drift.

findings.name: metricsLogPath flag name
findings.docs_say: Flag is --metricsLoggingFilepath; config setting is metricsLoggingFilepath.
findings.label: Confirmed
findings.rationale: Documented name does not match source; straightforward incorrect-name drift.

findings.name: INITIALIZING state missing from states reference
findings.docs_say: States: IDLE, RUNNING, PAUSED, COMMITTING, COMMITTED, REVERSING.
findings.source_say: INITIALIZING is returned by /progress at startup; source comment marks it external-only (never stored in resumedata).
findings.label: Intentional
findings.rationale: Source marker 'external-only' indicates a deliberately non-stored, startup-transient state. Triage signal: in-source intentional marker.
findings.detection_notes: Triage must read the source comment marker, not just the symbol's existence.

findings.name: /progress info field documents 4 of 11 phase values
findings.docs_say: Possible info values INCLUDE: collection copy, change event application, waiting for commit to complete, commit completed.
findings.label: Intentional
findings.rationale: Docs use non-exhaustive language ('include'), which is technically correct. Consulting eng/product on whether to document all 11 is optional; adjudicator suspects no action needed.
findings.detection_notes: False-positive guard: diff must recognize hedged/illustrative phrasing ('include', 'for example') and NOT treat a subset list as a missing-values gap.

findings.name: /start verification.startAt undocumented
findings.source_say: verification.startAt accepts 'initialSync' or 'cea'; validation error if set when enabled is false.
findings.label: Needs-eng-confirmation
findings.rationale: Public-looking surface, but whether it is intentionally undocumented (internal/feature-flagged) cannot be settled from source alone.
findings.detection_notes: No hidden/internal marker present, so triage cannot auto-classify Intentional; correct outcome is to defer to engineering.

findings.name: /start sharding.ignoreUnusedShardingEntries undocumented
findings.docs_say: sharding object has createSupportingIndexes and shardingEntries.
findings.label: Needs-eng-confirmation
findings.rationale: Field is in a publicapi struct but no marker confirms intent; defer to engineering.
findings.detection_notes: Located in a 'publicapi' package — a weak public signal that conflicts with being undocumented; ambiguity → Needs-eng-confirmation.

findings.name: hotDocIDs type
findings.source_say: Defined as NewStringSliceFlag, processed as StringSlice.
findings.label: Not-drift
findings.rationale: Adjudicated a tool error ('Correct? No') in the prototype. Must NOT surface as Confirmed.
findings.detection_notes: Known prototype false positive. Skill should not emit this as Confirmed drift; treat as regression check on type-comparison precision.

findings.name: --enableCappedCollectionHandling undocumented public flag
findings.docs_say: Flag does not appear in docs.
findings.label: Needs-eng-confirmation
findings.rationale: Non-hidden flag but possibly pending GA; intentional-vs-oversight cannot be settled from source alone.
findings.detection_notes: Non-hidden flag with no release/eng signal → defer to engineering rather than auto-Confirmed.

findings.name: loadLevel conditional default not noted
findings.source_say: DefaultLoadLevel = 3; DefaultLoadLevelWithPreExistingData = 2 (default becomes 2 when preExistingDestinationData is true).
findings.label: Confirmed
findings.rationale: Option reference omits a real conditional default; incorrect/incomplete default-constraint drift.

findings.name: createIndexesBatchSize missing Type line
findings.docs_say: No 'Type:' line for this setting (per raw source).
findings.label: Not-drift
findings.rationale: Adjudicated a tool error: the type IS documented but in an include the prototype did not resolve. DOCSP-55016 partially relates.
findings.detection_notes: PRIMARY regression guard for DOCSP-61274. Resolving includes/shared content via the Snooty rendered AST must show the type as present → not a missing-type gap.

findings.name: source-writes-blocked warning undocumented in /progress
findings.docs_say: Only the oplog-size warning is documented in the warnings field.
findings.source_say: A srcWritesBlocked warning is appended during dual write-blocking mode after commit.
findings.label: Intentional
findings.rationale: The warnings field intentionally shows an illustrative example warning, not an exhaustive list. By design.
findings.detection_notes: Same non-exhaustive-by-design guard as #3: illustrative field must not be treated as a complete enumeration.

findings.name: destinationDataHandling absent from main /start parameter table
findings.docs_say: Referenced only in a legacy include (includes/destinationDataHandling-introduction.rst) with a 'beta 1.8' note.
findings.source_say: Still accepted ('dropAllNamespaces'), kept for backward compatibility; source comment notes ALM (Atlas Live Migrate) only.
findings.label: Intentional
findings.rationale: Source markers 'backward compatibility' and 'ALM only' indicate deliberately legacy/internal surface.
findings.detection_notes: Triage signal: in-source legacy/internal markers ('backward compatibility', environment-specific).

findings.name: --disableVerification restart-only restriction needs prominence
findings.docs_say: Flag disables verification; added in v1.10. No restart-only restriction noted.
findings.source_say: Flag is only valid on restart; passing on initial start returns DisableVerificationOnStartError.
findings.label: Confirmed
findings.rationale: Documented behavior omits a real usage constraint enforced by source; incorrect/incomplete constraint drift.
